title: Progressive Stages of Meditation on Emptiness
author: Tsultrim Gyamtso Rinpoche
description: This is a new edition. Updated in 2016 by Lama Shenpen Hookham. Progressive stages of meditation on emptiness (Tib. stong nyid sgom rim) is a series of meditation practices on a particular aspect of the Buddha's teachings.
